end local function q(q)return Y[q+(-772281+772693)]end do local q=string.sub local Q=Y local G=type local I=string.len local j=table.insert local r=table.concat local X=string.char local return(function(Y,G,I,j,r,X,x,J,i,l,k,D,R,y,e,P,v,z,b,C,Q,a,g,K)Q,l,v,P,z,C,J,K,D,a,e,k,i,R,b,y,g=function(Q,I,j,r)local u,o,Xu,Eu,Zu,T,v,Iu,Cu,Hu,Au,xu,V,Ou,f,ju,M,H,nu,R,ru,au,vu,Pu,ou,Du,N,Ru,fu,d,U,iu,yu,h,gu,b,lu,w,Gu,qu,t,Wu,Bu,Mu,Vu,ku,B,du,Ku,bu,Su,O,Ju,Uu,cu,F,Lu,s,S,p,eu,c,zu,Z,J,A,L,x,m,pu,Yu,Nu,wu,Qu,D,E,n,W
